name: PlayStation
description: Sony's 32-bit home console platform that helped define the CD-ROM era and brought 3D gaming into the mainstream.

eras.title: Early 3D Era
eras.description: Launch-window experimentation with CD-ROM presentation, arcade conversions, and early 3D design.

eras.title: Mainstream Breakthrough Era
eras.description: PlayStation becomes the dominant console through RPGs, cinematic action games, racing, horror, and mascot platformers.

eras.title: Late Library Era
eras.description: Late releases and cross-generation support after the PlayStation 2 launch.
